sqlcity.statement: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tblCity ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY , cityName VARCHAR(50), longDeg VARCHAR(4), longMin VARCHAR(4), longDir INTEGER, latDeg VARCHAR(4), latMin VARCHAR(4), latDir INTEGER, countryId INTEGER, timeZoneId INTEGER )
